summary: FLAN-T5-base on DialogSum test set, 10 epochs, lr=5e-5, LoRA r=16, batch_size=4, MPS device

v1_to_v2_fixes: Added instruction prefix: 'Summarize the following dialogue.' (FLAN-T5 requires explicit instructions)
Lowered learning rate: 5e-4 → 5e-5 (aligned with reference project)
Replaced special tokens with natural language length instructions
Replaced [TOPIC] token with natural language prompt for multi-task

input_formats.exp1_multi_topic: What is the topic of the following dialogue? Answer in a short phrase.\nDialogue:\n{dialogue}

length_instructions.SHORT: Write a very brief one-sentence summary of the dialogue in 5 to 15 words.
length_instructions.MEDIUM: Write a short summary of the dialogue in 16 to 35 words.
length_instructions.LONG: Write a detailed summary of the dialogue in more than 35 words.

exp0_baseline.description: Baseline: instruction prefix, no length control, summarization only

exp1_length_control.description: Length-controllable summarization with natural language instructions

exp1_multi_task.description: Multi-task: summarization + topic generation, with length control

key_findings: 1. Instruction prefix is critical for FLAN-T5: ROUGE-L improved from 18.24 (no prefix) to 23.48 (with prefix), +28.7%
2. Natural language length instructions work: Length Accuracy improved from 28.7% (special tokens) to 54.5% (natural language), +90%
3. SHORT bucket is easiest to control (80.6%), MEDIUM is hardest (25.8%)
4. Length control does NOT degrade summarization quality: Exp1 ROUGE slightly exceeds baseline
5. Multi-task learning dramatically reduces training loss: 4.42 vs 14.57 (single-task), -70%
6. Multi-task ROUGE-L (23.48) marginally exceeds single-task (23.45) and baseline (23.13)
7. Lower learning rate (5e-5 vs 5e-4) and more epochs (10 vs 3) significantly improved convergence
